title: FNAF - PROJECT: NIGHTSHIFT
description: Bring FNAF into your minecraft world!
body:
![The Nightshift Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52a415cddc96983c348f99ab490bb48474486c61.png)
**"The Project: Nightshift mod aims to bring Five Nights at Freddy's into Minecraft, it was made as a thank you for Scott Cawthon."**

**Project Nightshift** is a Minecraft JAVA mod that aims to add characters and decorations from multiple games from the Five Nights at Freddy's series.
# Credits:
- Beph: Asset Creation, Animations and Owner
- LemonPush: Coding & Managment
- SomeoneCalledRagnarok: Animations
### Socials:
- Discord: [CLICK ME TO OPEN DISCORD !](https://discord.gg/CCh5QcKrsv)
- Youtube: [CLICK ME TO OPEN YOUTUBE !](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCm1G2dteufsJHxv4ni2GFBA)
## Mod by Citrus Creations
Every character in the mod belongs to Scott Cawthon unless stated otherwise.
